https://satreg-api.collegeboard.org/msregrequest-prod/student/registration-status

```json
{
    "status": "success",
    "isBanned": false,
    "registrationCount": 0,
    "isMaxRegistrationCount": false,
    "registrationCountLimit": 100,
    "testDates": []
}
```
